summary: Enhanced the '/sniff' smell checklist with new categories and expanded existing checks. Added 'Lifecycle & state smells' category (ephemeral state, connection singletons, unguarded transitions, leaking flags), 'Content & degradation smells' category (silent fallback, silent no-ops, raw platform errors, lost error metadata, error diagnostic quality), and 'Documentation & project smells' category (documentation drift, build reproducibility). Expanded structural smells with overlapping responsibilities, orphaned definitions, implicit dependencies, and updated standards gaps to reference linter config and CONTRIBUTING.md.
